title: Baked Sweet and Fish Medley
description: A flavorful and healthy baked dish made with sweet potatoes and mixed fish, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: mixed fish (salmon, cod, tilapia)
ingredients.notes: Skin removed and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut the sweet potatoes into 1-inch cubes and place them on the baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the sweet potatoes and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Toss the sweet potatoes to coat evenly.
Place the mixed fish pieces on top of the sweet potatoes.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the fish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the sweet potatoes are tender.
